languages.text: "Скажите, Лорд-капитан, будет ли предатель династии наказан?"

traits.locale_text: "Скажите, Лорд-капитан, будет ли предатель династии наказан?"

languages.text: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"
languages.original_text: "Скажите, Лорд-капитан, будет ли предатель династии наказан?"

traits.locale_text: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"
"Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"
"Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"

languages.text: "Sagt mir, Lord Captain, wird die Verräterin an der Dynastie bestraft werden?"
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"

traits.locale_text: "Sagt mir, Lord Captain, wird die Verräterin an der Dynastie bestraft werden?"

languages.text: “告诉我，舰长大人，那王朝的叛徒会受到惩罚吗？”
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"

traits.locale_text: “告诉我，舰长大人，那王朝的叛徒会受到惩罚吗？”

languages.text: « Dites-moi, seigneur-capitaine, châtierez-vous celle qui a trahi la dynastie ? »
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"

traits.locale_text: « Dites-moi, seigneur-capitaine, châtierez-vous celle qui a trahi la dynastie ? »

languages.text: «Dígame, Lord Capitán, ¿será castigado el traidor a la dinastía?».
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"

traits.locale_text: «Dígame, Lord Capitán, ¿será castigado el traidor a la dinastía?».

languages.text: "Söyleyin bana Lord Kaptan, hanedanlık haini cezalandırılacak mı?"
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"

traits.locale_text: "Söyleyin bana Lord Kaptan, hanedanlık haini cezalandırılacak mı?"

languages.text: 「お聞かせください、キャプテン様。王朝に裏切りを働く者は罰せられるのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"

traits.locale_text: 「お聞かせください、キャプテン様。王朝に裏切りを働く者は罰せられるのですか？」
